ecarx.carext.connect.oncall

Interface IOnCall

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BaseAPI

    public interface IOnCall
extends BaseAPI
    Call the call center for help.
    Since:
    4

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  IOnCall.ICallListener
      Call listener.

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

        BaseAPI.Callback

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default void acceptCall()
      Accept a ringing incoming call.
      default void callServiceEval(int number)
      Keyboard function transfers number to framework for Call service evaluation
      default void endCall()
      Ends the call.
      default Call getCurrentCall()
      Get the current call.
      default FunctionStatus getFunctionStatus(int callType)
      Get current function status.
      default RescueInfo getRescueInfo()
      Get rescue info.
      default boolean registerCallListener(IOnCall.ICallListener listener)
      Register call listener.
      default void startCall(int callType)
      Start a new outgoing call.
      default void unregisterCallListener(IOnCall.ICallListener listener)
      Unregister call listener.

      • Methods inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

        init, onRelease

    • Method Detail

      • getFunctionStatus

        @NonNull
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_ONCALL")
default FunctionStatus getFunctionStatus(int callType)
        Get current function status.
        Since:
        4

      • getCurrentCall

        @Nullable
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_ONCALL")
default Call getCurrentCall()
        Get the current call.
        Returns:
        null indicates not in a call.
        Since:
        4

      • startCall

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_ONCALL")
default void startCall(int callType)
        Start a new outgoing call.
        Since:
        4

      • acceptCall

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_ONCALL")
default void acceptCall()
        Accept a ringing incoming call.
        Since:
        4

      • endCall

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_ONCALL")
default void endCall()
        Ends the call. If there is a ringing call, calling this method rejects the ringing call. Otherwise the call is ended.
        Since:
        4

      • callServiceEval

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_ONCALL")
default void callServiceEval(int number)
        Keyboard function transfers number to framework for Call service evaluation
        Since:
        4

      • getRescueInfo

        @Nullable
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_ONCALL")
default RescueInfo getRescueInfo()
        Get rescue info.
        Returns:
        null indicates no rescue.
        Since:
        4

      • registerCallListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_ONCALL")
default boolean registerCallListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                         IOnCall.ICallListener listener)
        Register call listener. If there is a call or rescue, you will receive a corresponding callback immediately.
        Parameters:
        listener - The callback that will run.
        Returns:
        true if the operation succeeded, false otherwise.
        Since:
        4

      • unregisterCallListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_ONCALL")
default void unregisterCallListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                        IOnCall.ICallListener listener)
        Unregister call listener.
        Parameters:
        listener - The callback that don't want to receive event.
        Since:
        4
